zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Winnington於1427年出生在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓時，她的父親Sir Robert Winnington, Lord57歲，母親Katherine de Venables17歲。她於1445年與Sir Humphrey Blount在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年4月20日在英國史洛普爾金萊特享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Winnington于1427年出生在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓时，她的父亲Sir Robert Winnington, Lord57岁，母亲Katherine de Venables17岁。她于1445年与Sir Humphrey Blount在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年4月20日在英国史洛普爾金萊特享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾金萊特。

nameMeanings.name: Winnington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Winnington (Cheshire, Staffs). (ii)  see  Wennington  .

variants.name: Wennington
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Wennington (Hunts, Essex). (ii)  see  Winnington  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Winnington was born in 1427, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Winnington, Lord, was 57 and her mother, Katherine de Venables, was 17. She married Sir Humphrey Blount in 1445, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 April 1478, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Winnington est née en 1427, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Winnington, Lord, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Venables, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Humphrey Blount en 1445, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1478, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1445 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Humphrey Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. April 1478 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Kinlet, Shropshire, England und wurde in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Humphrey Blount nel 1445, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1478, nel Kinlet, Shropshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Kinlet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Winningtonが1427年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Winnington, Lordは57歳，母Katherine de Venablesは17歳であった。1445年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでSir Humphrey Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年4月20日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Winnington(이)가 1427년 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Winnington, Lord(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Venables(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Sir Humphrey Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 4월 20일 영국 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 킨렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Winnington nasceu em 1427, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Winnington, Lord, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Venables, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Humphrey Blount em 1445, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1478, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Barton Blount, Derbyshire, , England: Barton Blount, Derbyshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Winnington родилась в 1427 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Winnington, Lord было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Venables, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Humphrey Blount в 1445 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 апреля 1478 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Humphrey Blount en 1445, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1478, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
